task_description: Add recipe import from URL feature: users enter a URL, the Lambda fetches the page content, sends it to AWS Bedrock (eu.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0) with example recipes as few-shot prompt, parses the response into CreateRecipeInput format, saves to DynamoDB, and returns the recipe. Includes CDK permissions and Angular frontend form.

verification.summary: All three build targets (api, web, infra) pass with fresh compilation. No test framework configured in the project so test_quality check is skipped. Docker not needed for verification.
